final:
module top_module(
    input [0:0] address,
    input clock,
    output reg [7:0] q
);always @(posedge clock) begin
    if (address == 0) begin
        q <= 0;
    end else begin
        q <= {address, 7'b0};
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (address != 0) begin
        q <= 8'hFF;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
